overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring massive holographic advertisements, palm trees, and modern architecture. The footage is from a video game engine, showcasing neon-lit plazas and elevated walkways with atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to commercial plaza entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along a concrete sidewalk next to a modern ribbed building, approaching a wide plaza entrance with steps

entered.detail: tall building with vertical ribbed facade and illuminated signage
concrete sidewalk with painted yellow safety line
large glowing digital billboards on distant skyscrapers
wide tiered steps leading up to an elevated plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a city sidewalk at night, bordered by a modern building with vertical ribbing on the right. The path features a painted yellow safety line, and ahead, wide steps lead up to an elevated plaza. Distant skyscrapers display glowing holographic advertisements through the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with massive digital screens

events.description: transitions from sidewalk to ascending the wide plaza steps

agents.ego_description: walking up wide tiered steps into an open plaza, revealing palm trees and massive curved digital screens on the left

entered.detail: tall palm trees in large planters with atmospheric lighting
modern benches with glowing orange edge lighting
curved array of large digital advertisement screens covering the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends wide steps into an elevated open plaza, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to a spacious area with tall palm trees and modern benches featuring glowing edges. Massive curved holographic screens dominate the left side of the view, displaying vibrant advertisements against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza level with digital advertising displays

events.description: passes a futuristic black and gold vending kiosk on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza level, passing illuminated benches and palm trees while approaching the descending steps on the far side

entered.detail: tall black and gold automated machine with glowing elements
steps leading down from the plaza to a lower elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving through the upper plaza level, the camera passes between illuminated benches and palm trees on polished marble flooring. A futuristic vending kiosk appears briefly on the right. The massive holographic screens remain visible on the left as the camera approaches descending steps leading to a lower walkway, with an overpass structure becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway under overpass approaching commercial building

events.description: descends steps from plaza to lower elevated walkway under overpass
pedestrian appears standing on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: descending steps from the plaza and continuing along an elevated walkway under a concrete overpass, approaching a large cylindrical building

notable_agents.action: standing still facing away from camera, looking out at the city view

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure crossing above the walkway
large cylindrical commercial building with bright illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the plaza into a covered elevated walkway passing under a concrete overpass. The environment becomes more enclosed with mixed lighting from street lamps and distant neon signs. A lone pedestrian stands on the right side looking out at the view. The camera approaches a large cylindrical building with bright commercial signage, while the reflective wet pavement mirrors the surrounding lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow city sidewalk into a sprawling neon plaza before descending into a sheltered urban underpass. It begins along a ribbed modern building, following a yellow safety line toward wide steps that lead upward through a hazy night air filled with distant holographic skyscrapers. As the camera ascends, the environment opens into a spacious elevated plaza characterized by polished marble floors, glowing benches, and towering palm trees beneath massive, curved holographic screens. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past a futuristic vending kiosk and approaches a set of descending stairs, transitioning from the open air back into a more enclosed space. Finally, the camera passes under a concrete overpass onto a reflective wet walkway, gliding past a lone pedestrian toward a large cylindrical building adorned with bright commercial signage.
